calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:11 am
Judge Pro tem, Deborah Daniloff, presiding; Clerk: Annie Pascual; not reported, Dept. 525.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Joanna Xiao Zhang appears in pro per. Respondent Rong Cong Fong appears in pro per with Allen Fang sworn in as Chinese interpreter. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Daniloff.

EXHR (A) Receipts for work completed; gargabe fees, material and labor
EXHA (1) Collective documents; agreement for partial payment, fact of conflict statement and copy of check payments

9:45am Case taken under submission, newly marked evidence is retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Judgment Entered
